plugins.name: orchestrator-core
plugins.description: Multi-agent orchestrator: 8 agents (reader, researcher, writer, thinker, checker, reviewer, tester, documenter), 4 skills (orchestrator, orchestrator-plan, orchestrator-execute, orchestrator-team), stack-agnostic dev-tools MCP server with timeout protection, full hook suite (SessionStart, SubagentStop JSON-validated blocking, PostToolUse auto-context, PreCompact snapshot with progress.md, TeammateIdle gate, SessionEnd audit). Activate with: Skill("/orchestrator-core:orchestrator") in CLAUDE.md.

plugins.name: ty-lsp
plugins.description: Python LSP via Astral ty — go-to-definition, find-references, document-symbol on Python files. Requires: uv tool install ty

plugins.name: vtsls-lsp
plugins.description: TypeScript/JavaScript LSP via vtsls — go-to-definition, find-references, document-symbol on .ts/.tsx/.js files. Requires: npm install -g @vtsls/language-server
